shared_attributes.hitbox_margin: 3px smaller than sprite on all sides

context.role: Aerial obstacle requiring player to duck or time jump carefully
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=50px or 80px (Low/High variants), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Advanced obstacle appearing after 200+ points, spawned by SpawnSystem with 30-40% probability, forces player to use duck input. Low variant (y=50px) requires ducking, High variant (y=80px) can be passed without input

visual_specification.shape: Pteranodon/pterodactyl with long beak, outstretched wings in flight pose
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art, hard edges, wing membrane details

animation.description: Wing flapping animation - frame 1: wings up position, frame 2: wings down position. Total duration: 0.2 seconds per loop. Seamless loop required

visual_specification.details: Long pointed beak, wings extended in flight, frame 1 shows wings raised upward, frame 2 shows wings lowered downward, body horizontal

relationships.shared_with: Same color scheme as all obstacles, animated like player_run and player_duck
relationships.differences_from: All cactus variants are static (no animation) and ground-based (y=0px). Pterodactyl is aerial (y=50px or 80px) and animated at 10 FPS. Requires duck input unlike cacti which require jump

explicit_negations: No shadows on ground or body
No transparency except full alpha channel
